hero.name: Keltoum Malouki
hero.description: I build modern, performant, and accessible web experiences. Based in Casablanca, open to mobility and new opportunities.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me
about.description: I'm Keltoum Malouki, a Full Stack Web Developer from Casablanca, Morocco. With hands-on training at YouCode (UM6P), I deliver complete web solutions from front-end interfaces to back-end architecture. I care about clean code, user experience, and continuous learning.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with

dabadoc.title: Full Stack Developer
dabadoc.description: Develop and maintain features for a medical appointment-booking platform. Improve UI and user experience across the product.
dabadoc.stack: Ruby on Rails, Angular, CoffeeScript, MongoDB, Docker, Git/GitHub

caisseManager.title: Web Developer Intern
caisseManager.description: Built a showcase site and integrated front-end interfaces for financial management tools.
caisseManager.stack: Next.js, React.js, TailwindCSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Shadcn UI, Git/GitHub

youcode.title: Full Stack Development Program
youcode.description: Hands-on training in front-end and back-end web development, agile project management, and modern software engineering practices.

eventBooking.description: Event management application with booking system and user-role management.
